title: Quit Method, Spel Class
syntax:
Sub Quit (TaskNumber As Integer)

Sub Quit (TaskName As String)
parameters:
TaskNumber	The
		 task number of the task to be interrupted. The range of the task
		 number is 1 to 32.

TaskName	A
		 string expression containing the name of the task.

Note

The function executed by Call method cannot be stopped/paused by Stop, Pause, Halt, or Quit method.

If you need to stop or pause, use Xqt Method.
description: Terminates execution of the specified task.
see_also:
Halt

Resume

Xqt

Quit Example

VB
